title: Victoria Street building collapse: Minute of silence
description: GEORGE NEWS - In a somber reflection of the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - In a somber reflection of the tragic events that unfolded one week ago today, George Municipality stand together in solemn remembrance of the lives lost in the Victoria Street building collapse, which occurred on 6 May at 14:09.


> To the residents of George and all of South Africa, we humbly request your participation in observing a moment of silence today at precisely 14:09.


This act of solidarity is a poignant gesture to honor those who perished and to extend our heartfelt support to the families affected by this tragedy.

Photo: Michelle Pienaar

ALSO READ: Building collapse in Victoria Street

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
